mapper.sql: id, parent_id, permission_code, permission_name, permission_type, api_path, sort_num, description, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into sys_permission (parent_id, permission_code, permission_name, permission_type, api_path, sort_num, description, status, created_at, updated_at) values (#{parentId}, #{permissionCode}, #{permissionName}, #{permissionType}, #{apiPath}, #{sortNum}, #{description}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update sys_permission set parent_id = #{parentId}, permission_code = #{permissionCode}, permission_name = #{permissionName}, permission_type = #{permissionType}, api_path = #{apiPath}, sort_num = #{sortNum}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
